Items.Title: 使用 StaticSave 免费在线托管 CSS 代码 | Hosting CSS Code Online for free with StaticSave
Items.Description:
出于多种原因，这可能很有用，例如与他人共享您的代码或保留您的代码备份以防您的计算机崩溃。

为什么使用静态保存？

您可能希望使用 StaticSave 来托管 CSS 代码的原因有很多。 例如，如果您是 Web 开发人员，您可以使用 StaticSave 与他人共享您的代码。 或者，如果您担心丢失代码，可以使用 StaticSave 进行备份。

如何使用静态保存

使用 StaticSave 很容易。 首先，访问 StaticSave 网站并创建一个帐户。 拥有帐户后，使用文件类型创建文件夹和所需文件，然后您可以将 CSS 代码粘贴到提供的字段中。 为此，请在创建文件后单击“提交以保存”按钮。

保存或托管您的文件后，您可以通过复制和粘贴代码的 URL 与他人共享它。

另请阅读： CSS 在 Web 开发中的重要性

首先，它是免费的。 其次，它易于使用。 第三，这可能是与他人共享代码的好方法。

但是，有一些缺点。 首先，您的代码是公开的或未列出的。 拥有该 URL 的任何人都可以查看您的代码。 其次，StaticSave 不会将您的代码设为私有，除非您升级到高级帐户。 如果您不小心删除了代码，则无法恢复。

结论

它具有许多优点，例如免费且易于使用。



原文:

StaticSave is a free online service that allows you to host your CSS code for free. This can be useful for a number of reasons, such as sharing your code with others or keeping a backup of your code in case your computer crashes.

Why use StaticSave?

There are a number of reasons why you might want to use StaticSave to host your CSS code. For example, if you are a web developer, you can use StaticSave to share your code with others. Or, if you are worried about losing your code, you can use StaticSave to keep a backup.

How to use StaticSave

Using StaticSave is easy. First, go to the StaticSave website and create an account. Once you have an account, create folder and the required file with the file type, then you can paste your CSS code in the field provided. To do this, click the “Submit to Save” button after you have created a file.

Once your file is saved or hosted, you can share it with others by copying and pasting the code’s URL.

Also Read: Importance of CSS in Web Development

Pros and cons of StaticSave

StaticSave has a number of advantages. First, it’s free. Second, it’s easy to use. Third, it can be a great way to share your code with others.

However, there are a few disadvantages. First, your code is public or unlisted. Anyone who has the URL can view your code. Second, StaticSave does not offer your code to be private, unless you upgrade to Premium account. If you accidentally delete your code, there is no way to recover it.

Conclusion

StaticSave is a free online service that can be used to host CSS code. It has a number of advantages, such as being free and easy to use.
